headline: Woman's 'Dry January' Lasts 47 Minutes, Turns Into 'Damp January'
summary: She's now calling it 'Moist March' as a compromise with herself.
fullBody: Amanda Resolve posted her Dry January commitment on Instagram, then broke it 47 minutes later. 'It was a stressful 47 minutes,' Resolve explained. She's now on a 'reduced consumption journey' that involves 'only drinking on days that end in Y.' Her friends have started a betting pool on when 'Moist March' will become 'Wet April.' Amanda is currently 'manifesting moderation' with a glass of wine in hand.
